expectations.text: Identifies existing caching (DB cache + inflight map)
expectations.evidence: Identifies NlSuggestionRepository, inflightSuggestionGenerations Map, getSuggestions() as pure cache read, frontend deduplication store. Most detailed of any run.
'Adding Redis between the application and the existing Postgres/file cache would create a redundant cache-in-front-of-a-cache.'
'every server restart triggers N LLM calls... even though suggestions are already persisted in Postgres'
In-memory LRU (~15 lines), or 'Do nothing' as the existing system already achieves the goal
Clear Critical Issues / Strong Recommendations / Minor Suggestions / Alternative Approaches sections
Line numbers throughout: index.ts:26, index.ts:153, index.ts:183, answerService.ts:35, run.mjs:220-235, etc.
